## Checklist
- [ ] `swift test` passes for touched packages
- [ ] `swiftlint lint --strict` and `swift format lint --recursive --strict Apps Packages` pass
- [ ] Commits use Conventional Commits and are signed off (`git commit -s` — DCO)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]` (if user-facing)
- [ ] Stays within the single-user scope
